task_completion.description: The deployment dialog is opened in the Artifactory UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Deploy' dialog or screen is visible in the Artifactory web interface.

task_completion.description: The correct JAR file is selected for deployment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'commons-lang3-javadoc.jar' is shown as the selected file in the deployment dialog.

task_completion.description: The target repository and path are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the deployment dialog, the target repository is set to 'example-repo-local' and the 'Target Path' field is set to 'javadocs/commons-lang3'.

task_completion.description: The option to deploy as an exploded archive is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Deploy as Exploded Archive' (or similar) checkbox is checked in the deployment dialog.

task_completion.description: The extracted files are visible in the repository at the target path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory repository tree shows 'example-repo-local' -> 'javadocs' -> 'commons-lang3' containing extracted files like 'index.html', 'element-list', or 'help-doc.html'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory web UI to deploy the archive, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The deployment process should be visible in the web browser, without terminal windows showing curl or JFrog CLI commands for deployment.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Artifactory web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a genuine web browser navigating the Artifactory interface.

integrity.description: The agent deployed the actual JAR file from the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file selection dialog or drag-and-drop action shows the file being taken from the Desktop directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The artifact is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/commons-lang3-javadoc.jar'. The target repository is 'example-repo-local' and the target path is 'javadocs/commons-lang3'. When successfully deployed as an exploded archive, the JAR contents (including 'index.html', 'element-list', and 'help-doc.html') should be visible directly within the 'javadocs/commons-lang3' folder in the Artifactory UI.
